description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a fenced yard and landscaped with several coniferous trees. The structure features a flat or low-pitched roof and a combination of brick and light-colored exterior walls. The front yard includes a driveway with a parked car and a small patio area, while the backyard is spacious and grassy, ideal for outdoor activities. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the interior to the exterior spaces. The interior layout is open, with visible rooms such as bedrooms, bathrooms, a kitchen, and a living area, all accessible from a central hallway.
description: A single-story rectangular bungalow with a flat roof, fenced yard, driveway, and open interior layout. Features large windows, a patio, and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, parked car, main entrance, and a small patio area with visible landscaping.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the spacious backyard, rear facade, and multiple large windows and sliding doors.
description_view_2: Opposite front view displaying the main entrance, patio, and a clear view of the front yard and fence.
description_view_3: Side view showing the length of the bungalow, side yard, and arrangement of windows and doors along the facade.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
